_description: This config controls the exponential scaling of mob/boss stats. Adjust these values to tune game difficulty.

mob._explanation: 6% stronger per level. Level 30 mob = ~5.4x base stats, Level 60 = ~29x

boss._explanation: 7% stronger per level. Bosses scale slightly faster than mobs.

baseStatsPerLevel._comment: Base stat points distributed per level (before exponential scaling)

mob._distribution: Points are distributed based on mob archetype (tanky, damage, balanced)

boss._distribution: Bosses get more base stat points per level than regular mobs

hpMultipliers._comment: HP is calculated as: baseHP * level * hpMultiplier * exponentialScaling

expRewardConfig._comment: Experience reward calculation: multiplier * level^exponent. Tuned for desired kills per tier pattern.
expRewardConfig._targetKills: ~30-40 kills for tiers 1&5, ~70-90 kills for mid tiers, ~100-130 kills for late tiers

mob._explanation: Level 1: 8 EXP, Level 10: 99 EXP, Level 30: 355 EXP, Level 50: 637 EXP. Scaling slower than EXP requirements means more kills at higher levels.

goldRewardConfig._comment: Gold reward calculation: base * level * multiplier

skillLevelScaling._comment: Boss skill levels based on boss level
